title: Shadow Trim SMP Season 1 Mod
description: A custom mod designed for the Shadow Trim SMP Season 1 server. This mod enhances vanilla gameplay with custom armor trims, unique gear, multiplayer-focused features, and lore-based mechanics. Built for a story-driven, community-oriented SMP experience.
body:
Welcome to Shadow Trim SMP Season 1 — a custom mod crafted to elevate the survival multiplayer experience. Built specifically for the Shadow Trim server, this mod introduces enhanced armor trims, unique items, multiplayer utilities, and immersive lore mechanics that encourage exploration, teamwork, and storytelling.

Whether you're forging alliances, uncovering secrets, or battling through custom challenges, the mod is designed to support both casual and competitive playstyles. Perfect for players seeking a rich, evolving SMP world shaped by community interaction.

Trinkets: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets)

Fabric API: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
